buildCommand: mkdir -p lib/core/constants && echo "class Secrets { static const supabaseUrl = '${SUPABASE_URL}'; static const supabaseAnonKey = '${SUPABASE_ANON_KEY}'; static const geminiApiKey = '${GEMINI_API_KEY}'; }" > lib/core/constants/secrets.dart && if [ ! -d "flutter" ]; then git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable; fi && ./flutter/bin/flutter build web --release
